This is a random document about cooking pasta.

Ingredients: spaghetti, tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, basil.

Step 1: Boil 4 quarts of water. Add salt.
Step 2: Cook pasta 8-10 minutes until al dente.
Step 3: Sauté garlic in oil for 2 minutes.
Step 4: Add tomatoes, simmer 15 minutes.
Step 5: Combine and serve.

Tip: Use high-quality olive oil for best results.
Serves: 4 people.
Prep time: 10 minutes. Cook time: 25 minutes.
